title: NHRA Circular No. 14 of 2020 Temporary Approval for Tele-Medicine Consultation
summary: Allows private healthcare facilities to provide telemedicine consultation during the COVID-19 period subject to NHRA direction and relevant professional and facility requirements.

theme_notes.digital_health.telehealth_digital_servic: Temporary approval for telemedicine consultation by private healthcare facilities.

notes: Related instruments: Related to NHRA Telemedicine Dispensing Procedure and health facility licensing rules
